package x

import "fmt"

// ID is a string alias type.
type ID string

// Greeter is the interface a server implements.
type Greeter interface {
	Greet(name string) string
}

// Server holds greeting state.
type Server struct {
	prefix string
	Greeter
}

// Run is a top-level function.
func Run(id ID) error {
	fmt.Println(id)
	return nil
}

// Greet implements Greeter on Server.
func (s Server) Greet(name string) string {
	return s.prefix + name
}
